content: Google Places API multilingual/Chinese search issues: (1) Language parameter influences results but does not guarantee full translation - details may remain in English even with language=zh-TW or zh-CN. (2) Chinese names are ambiguous - same characters can mean different things in different regions. (3) API geocoder interprets abbreviations differently by language. (4) Name matching for Chinese input requires careful handling - traditional vs simplified characters, romanization variants (Wade-Giles vs Pinyin). (5) Location biasing critical for disambiguation - '台北101' vs '101大楼' in different cities.
